title: cytisus purgans subsp. balansae
intro: Cytisus purgans subsp. balansae, also known as the Balansa broom or French broom, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a laxative and anti-inflammatory agent due to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cytisus purgans subsp. balansae include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea, decoction, or infusion, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
